llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Compensation & Benefits (Specialist)
job.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
job.description: Objectives of the Position • Understand business needs and provide best suited support on Compensation and Benefits for specific assigned Country in the APAC region. • Support respective countries assigned in the region by engaging with the stakeholders, from HRBPs to country C B teams in Compensation Benefits matters including data analysis and providing operational support. • Support in identifying and implementing process improvements and best practices in the C B space to ensure smooth implementation and engagement of best practice for respective countries. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Operational Excellence • Responsible in preparation of data and analysis required to support any Compensation Benefits initiatives such as performance management, salary budgeting and merit increment cycle, annual benefit renewal program and market benchmarking exercise for countries in APAC region • Supports in collating economic indicators, external market practices and data analysis patterns and translates into meaningful indicators for development of any C B initiatives and proposals to maintain market competitiveness • Key person for job family matching and data submission for all Compensation Benefits relevant market surveys (for eg: Mercer Remuneration Survey) with the guidance of the Expert • Responsible for renewal and implementation of Compensation Benefits program such as insurance, Flexible Benefits and Employee Assistance Program by managing, coordinating and following up with vendors, which includes market competitiveness analysis and requirement setting • Manages and coordinates with vendors in the Compensation Benefits are for insurance enquiries, market data purchase, employee assistance program vendors • Supports Country HR for in scope countries in developing communications for Employees and Manager for implementation of Compensation Benefit programs • Supports Experts in Global Compensation Benefits projects and activities by sharing current processes and studying the impact of new programs and processes to BASF HR systems • Provide advise to Country HR based on existing guidelines, policies and practices BASF Corporate Rule Base, labor laws etc for reference • Responsible for all recurring C B operational activities such as insurance employee movement updates, year end benefits provisioning, processing of C B vendor related payments, job evaluation request • Supports and ensures any C B tools and systems (for eg: SuccessFactors...
